title: Poison control center; establishment
doc_html:
PART IV. POISON CONTROL CENTER

§1267.1. Poison control center; establishment

            The Louisiana Department of Health shall provide for the establishment of a statewide poison control center at the University of Louisiana at Monroe. The university may cooperate with public and private agencies and health care institutions in the operation of the center. The center shall include operation of a statewide toll-free telephone number.

            Acts 1991, No. 297, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1296 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART IV.  POISON CONTROL CENTER
§1267.1.  Poison control center; establishment
The Louisiana Department of Health shall provide for the establishment of a
statewide poison control center at the University of Louisiana at Monroe.  The university
may cooperate with public and private agencies and health care institutions in the operation
of the center.  The center shall include operation of a statewide toll-free telephone number.
Acts 1991, No. 297, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1296 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
